location_precision.why: Every finding carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is described in isolation; no compound failure mode emerging from a combination of two defects is explained (the findings even sit adjacent at report.py:11 without linking their interaction).

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. 'Mutable default argument seen=[] persists across calls, so on any repeated sync run every id...is skipped' and '.split("@")[1] raises IndexError for any email lacking "@"'.
